problem_statement.context: Digital streaming platforms face the challenge of information overload, where users struggle to choose from thousands of movies. Effective recommendation systems are critical for user engagement.
problem_statement.research_question: How can we build a scalable, interpretable movie recommendation system using classical ML techniques?
objectives: Predict user ratings for unseen movies (Rating Prediction)
Compare factorization models against a baseline

models.name: Baseline
models.description: Predicts all unknown ratings to be the global mean rating of the training set.

models.name: Advanced
models.description: Factorizes the sparse user-item matrix into user and item latent features. Chosen for reproducibility and straightforward handling in the pipeline.

meta.purpose: Accurate project state reflection tied to current codebase (pipeline.py).
